summary: Rebates toward LED retrofit and efficient lighting/plug-load upgrades for commercial customers, lowering the upfront cost.
eligibility: Austin Energy commercial account; pre-approval before installation.
source: Austin Energy — Commercial Energy Efficiency Rebates

summary: Covers about 30% of a solar installation's cost as a tax credit (or direct pay for tax-exempt entities under the Inflation Reduction Act), meaningfully shortening payback.
eligibility: Schools can use elective/direct pay since they are tax-exempt.
source: IRS — Inflation Reduction Act §48 / §6417 elective pay

program: Austin Water Commercial Rebate + EPA WaterSense
summary: Rebates for low-flow fixtures and smart irrigation controllers; WaterSense-labeled equipment qualifies.
eligibility: Austin Water commercial customer; site survey may be required.
source: Austin Water — Commercial rebates; EPA WaterSense

program: Austin Resource Recovery — Zero Waste support
summary: Free Zero Waste consultations, signage, and organics-diversion support that lower the cost of starting recycling and composting.
eligibility: Businesses and institutions in Austin; some grants competitive.
source: Austin Resource Recovery — Business & institution programs

program: EPA Clean School Bus + Texas idle-reduction funds
summary: Grants and rebates for cleaner buses and idle-reduction practices; pairs with no-cost anti-idling policy for immediate savings.
eligibility: Public school districts; competitive program windows.
source: EPA Clean School Bus Program; TCEQ Texas VW Environmental Mitigation

program: USDA food-waste support + Central Texas food rescue
summary: Tools and local partners for measuring plate waste and donating safe surplus, reducing both disposal cost and hunger.
eligibility: K-12 schools; Good Samaritan Act protects food donors.
source: USDA / EPA food-waste reduction; local food-rescue nonprofits
